## Summary
Indo Premier Sekuritas Q1 2026 preview for metals sector: Average Selling Price (ASP) increases expected to boost Net Profit, with ANTM (Aneka Tambang) positioned to deliver the best quarterly results.

## Key Points
• Q1 2026 metals sector preview from Indo Premier Sekuritas
• ASP (Average Selling Price) increases driving net profit growth
• ANTM expected to deliver best results among nickel miners
• INCO and ESSA tagged in metals sector analysis
• Nickel/copper price dynamics supporting earnings

## Portfolio Impact
🟡 **Neutral/Watch** — ANTM and INCO on your watchlist. ANTM expected to show strongest Q1 results from ASP increases. ESSA (Ammonia/Chemical) tagged due to industrial metals exposure. Your ESSA position (+9.33% unrealized) benefits from broader industrial strength. Monitor ANTM for potential entry if Q1 results confirm bullish thesis.
